lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Saarang, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, Fifth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨ ਮੋਹੁ ਨ ਬੁਝਤ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਕਾਲ ਗ੍ਰਸ ਸੰਸਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: maan mohu na bujhat trisanaa kaal gras sansaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Pride, attachment and desire are not quenched; the world is in the grip of death. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਤ ਪੀਵਤ ਹਸਤ ਸੋਵਤ ਅਉਧ ਬਿਤੀ ਅਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: khaat peevat hasat sovat aaudh bitee asaar |
lines.english: Eating, drinking, laughing and sleeping, life passes uselessly.
Meditate, vibrate on the Lord; other actions are corrupt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕ ਉਦਰਿ ਭ੍ਰਮੰਤ ਜਲਤੋ ਜਮਹਿ ਕੀਨੀ ਸਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: narak udar bhramant jalato jameh keenee saar |1|
lines.english: The mortal wanders in reincarnation, burning in the hellish environment of the womb; in the end, he is destroyed by death. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਦ੍ਰੋਹ ਕਰਤ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਪਾਪ ਰਤ ਕਰ ਝਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: par droh karat bikaar nindaa paap rat kar jhaar |
lines.english: He practices fraud, cruelty and slander against others; he sins, and washes his hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬੂਝ ਨਾਹੀ ਤਮ ਮੋਹ ਮਹਾਂ ਅੰਧਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binaa satigur boojh naahee tam moh mahaan andhaar |2|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, he has no understanding; he is lost in the utter darkness of anger and attachment. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਠਗਉਰੀ ਖਾਇ ਮੂਠੋ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਸਿਰਜਨਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bikh tthgauree khaae moottho chit na sirajanahaar |
lines.english: He takes the intoxicating drugs of cruelty and corruption, and is plundered. He is not conscious of the Creator Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੁਪਤ ਹੋਇ ਰਹਿਓ ਨਿਆਰੋ ਮਾਤੰਗ ਮਤਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gobind gupat hoe rahio niaaro maatang mat ahankaar |3|
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is hidden and unattached. The mortal is like a wild elephant, intoxicated with the wine of egotism. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੰਤ ਰਾਖੇ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਅਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kar kripaa prabh sant raakhe charan kamal adhaar |
lines.english: In His Mercy, God saves His Saints; they have the Support of His Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਜੋਰਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਰਨਿ ਆਇਓ ਗੋੁਪਾਲ ਪੁਰਖ ਅਪਾਰ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੨੯॥
lines.translit: kar jor naanak saran aaeo goupaal purakh apaar |4|1|129|
lines.english: With his palms pressed together, Nanak has come to the Sanctuary of the Primal Being, the Infinite Lord God. ||4||1||129||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Saarang, Fifth Mehl, Sixth House, Partaal:
Chant His Sublime Word and His Priceless Glories.
Why are you indulding in corrupt actions?
Meditate on the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and attain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.
Look at this, see and understand!
Its expanse is false.
The world is a dream.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰੰਗ ਕਰਤੀ ਮਹਾ ਕੇਲ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har sang rang karatee mahaa kel |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Imbued with the Love of the Lord, you shall totally play with Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖੀ ਕਾਇ ਮੋਹਿ ਮੋਹਿਲੀ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਮੇਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sakhee kaae mohi mohilee pria preet ridai mel |1|
lines.english: O my companion, why are you so enticed by the Enticer? Enshrine the Love of Your Beloved within your heart. ||1||
He is total love and affection.
God is always merciful.
Others - why are you involved with others?
Remain involved with the Lord.
When you join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy,
Now, your association with death is ended. ||2||1||130||
says Nanak, meditate on the Lord.
You may make donations of gold,
Saarang, Fifth Mehl:
and give away land in charity

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਹੀ ਰੇ ਨਾਮ ਤੁਲਿ ਮਨ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਲਾਗੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naahee re naam tul man charan kamal laage |1| rahaau |
lines.english: but none of this is equal to the Lord's Name. Remain attached to the Lord's Lotus Feet. ||1||Pause||
You may recite the four Vedas with your tongue,
and purify your mind in various ways,
and listen to the eighteen Puraanas and the six Shaastras with your ears,
but these are not equal to the celestial melody of the Naam, the Name of the Lord of the Universe.
Remain attached to the Lord's Lotus Feet. ||1||
You may observe fasts, and say your prayers, purify yourself
You may cook your food without touching anyone;
and do good deeds; you may go on pilgrimages everywhere and eat nothing at all.
you may make a great show of cleansing techniques,
O Merciful Lord, please hear the prayer of the meek and the poor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੁ ਦਰਸੁ ਨੈਨ ਪੇਖਉ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਮਿਸਟ ਲਾਗੇ ॥੨॥੨॥੧੩੧॥
lines.translit: dehu daras nain pekhau jan naanak naam misatt laage |2|2|131|
lines.english: Please grant me the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, that I may see You with my eyes. The Naam is so sweet to servant Nanak. ||2||2||131||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੂਪ ਦੀਪ ਕਰਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਤੁਲਿ ਨ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhoop deep karate har naam tul na laage |
lines.english: and burn incense and devotional lamps, but none of these are equal to the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਜਾਪਿ ਰਮਤ ਰਾਮ ਸਹਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam raam raam jaap ramat raam sahaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord, Raam, Raam, Raam. The Lord is your Help and Support. ||1||Pause||
Saarang, Fifth Mehl:
